title: Ironclad Truth Serum — Super Intelligence Reality Field
motto: Clean voltage, smooth operator, 100% truth confidence on the whole SI field.
role: Truth serum capstone — gates Universal Protector, sense neural, plate meld, and cognition before adapt

truth_serum.claim: ironclad:neural:1 Super Intelligence reality field truth serum under God

clean_voltage.rule: voltage_is_voltage — strip to wave; no encoding on the trust layer

voltage_regulation.rule: When voltage started — operate at present rail; power-company grid blocked; no conversion; no entropy on trust layer

smoothness.rule: No unexpected slowdown — thermal headroom, stable meld cadence, field-max smooth operator

field_sanity.rule: Integral simplify — classify, strip, dedupe, flatten, cool_sort; never build under heat

single_field_depth.rule: Soft touch — parallel I/O, single field amplitude; depth zero always; depth fields sealed and destroyed

verdicts.GREEN: Ironclad sealed + clean voltage + smooth operator + all targets serum-pass
verdicts.WATCH: Ironclad pending or smoothness advisory — truth high but operator not fully sealed
verdicts.BLOCKED: Integrity fail, voltage doctrine breach, or target fails serum
